proven.claim: Proven: empty-line separator (538) executes immediately after 537 —
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2
; LINE: 538
; Proven: empty-line separator (538) executes immediately after 537 —
; no state mutation or branch lies between them.
(declare-const stmt_537_fired Int)
(declare-const stmt_538_fired Int)
; Precondition: line 537 has executed
(assert (= stmt_537_fired 1))
; Transition: sequential code, no intervening branch → stmt_538 fires iff stmt_537 fired
(assert (= stmt_538_fired stmt_537_fired))
; NEGATE: 538 does not fire despite 537 having fired
(assert (not (= stmt_538_fired 1)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — nothing between 537 and 538 can suppress 538
